items.title: EV charging demand is stressing local grids, and Texture just raised $12.5M to tackle it
items.summary: Grid software startup Texture has raised a $12.5 million Series A round as utilities scramble to keep up with rising electricity demand from EVs, EV chargers, data centers, renewables, and extreme weather.

items.title: Apple to update App Store age ratings in Australia and Vietnam next month

items.title: Who will benefit most from SpaceX IPO? Mostly Elon - and a few from his inner circle
